data.body: Added 8th child to calibration epic 9d50: story d4cf-0780-cbed-4879 — new plan-review criterion G7 'leaf-plan parent-containment' (AGENT-exec, fires only on leaf tickets with a parent, leaf scope must be subset of parent, PARENT WINS on conflict — coaching directs realign-leaf or update-parent-first). Motivated by the observed epic failure where leaf plans drifted during claiming and the divergence surfaced only at epic close. Ships advisory per expand-contract with a fast promotion review; explicit non-goal noted: parent edits do not yet stale children's attestations (candidate follow-up).
